{"text":"The overall average of Profit is $147,045. Among the suppliers, \"ACS Innovations\" has the most significant positive impact on increasing the overall average of Profit by 14.6%, raising it to $147,045 from $125,508 when excluded. Conversely, \"Sport Vision,\" \"Ventura Distribution,\" and \"Columbia House\" each decrease the overall average of Profit by 2.7%, with the average increasing to approximately $151,000 when these {"text":"The Northeast region leads in all metrics, with the highest **Revenue** at  **$8,554,415**, **Profit Margin** at **15.21%**, and **Profit** at  **$1,300,732**. The Northwest region has the lowest values, with **Revenue** at  **$1,761,187** and **Profit** at  **$266,986**. The Web region has the lowest **Profit Margin** at **14.95%**. The South, Central, and Mid-Atlantic regions have similar performance, with revenues ranging from  **$4,452,615** to  **$5,389,280** and profit margins around **15%**. The Southeast and Southwest regions show moderate performance, with the Southeast having the second-lowest revenue and profit.","interpretationStash":{"approach":"sql","userQuestion":"Show me grid of {"text":"The heatmap visualization of Profit by Region reveals that the **Northeast** region has the highest profit at  **$1,300,732**, while the **Northwest** region has the lowest profit at  **$266,986**. The **Web** region also contributes a significant amount with  **$583,538**.
